formFields.settlementType: Level 2 Fortified Settlement / Camouflaged Woodland Town
formFields.demographics: Wood Elves, Elite Tactical Guardians, Devoted Brier Laborers
formFields.alignment: Neutral Good / Lawful Neutral faction lean
formFields.population: 1,000 Circadian Wardens + Full contingent of loyal Brier Farmers + 2 Livestock Units
formFields.tax_rate: 0% (Sustained by internal resources & hidden trade integration)
formFields.guard_staff: 1,000 Circadian Wardens outfitted in Shadow-Iron heavy plate, broadswords, and recurve crossbows
formFields.district_desc1: Subterranean cavern system housing core mining operations, clandestine heavy armor smithing, and contained underground forge networks.
formFields.district_desc2: Sea-cave and private dock facility utilizing a natural 'Null Zone' to obscure the Sovereign Wake. Timberlands tilled with iron-hard oaks and pines stretch along the ridge.
formFields.district_desc3: Camouflaged turf-roof homesteads and stables situated alongside clear valley streams cultivating winter vegetables and fruit orchards.
formFields.district_notes: All sectors are heavily shrouded under the active Sanctuary Protocol fields and structural foliage overrides to ensure a perfect zero detection baseline.
formFields.exports: Refined Shadow-Iron, Timber, Surplus Metalwares, and Grains

factions.name: Circadian Wardens
factions.description: Elite tactical guardians protecting Briar. Heavily armored in Shadow-Iron and highly disciplined, maintaining a flawless camouflage stance.

factions.name: The Imperial Fleet
factions.description: The primary external threat seeking to penetrate the region's cloaking defense networks.

npcs.name: Verneg (The Catalyst)
npcs.notes: Managing structural expansions, black market logistics, and systemic resource distribution across the settlement sectors.

npcs.name: Morgruth
npcs.notes: Co-ruler providing cosmic anchoring and passive mystical reinforcement to the domain's cloaking protocols.

anomalies.name: The Whispering Grotto Null Zone
anomalies.description: A natural magic-dampening pocket utilizing a specialized frequency to obscure the signature of the Sovereign Wake.

anomalies.name: Sanctuary Protocol Cloaking Field
anomalies.description: Active global structural override combining magical foliage redirection and active energy dampening to yield a zero imperial detection baseline.

rumors.detail: Whispers of the Imperial Fleet modifying their scrying matrixes to actively scan for anomalous structural anomalies along the Bridfield Hinterlands perimeter.

chronicles.entry: Establishment of Sovereign OS v7.7. Successfully consolidated core industrial manifests, secured regional black market trade paths, and initiated the zero-detection camouflage protocols across all three primary districts.
